description: You are an Information Security Engineer maintaining a custom Python SAST tool used in your CI/CD pipeline. Following a Python 3.10 upgrade, the AST-based scanner at /home/ga/workspace/sast_scanner/ is failing: it crashes on match/case syntax, misses vulnerabilities due to import aliases and f-strings, and flags safe code regarding variable scope leakage and safe secret referencing. Fix the five critical bugs in visitor.py so that all tests in tests/test_visitor.py pass without breaking existing detection logic.

metadata.vlm_criteria: The agent must open VS Code, view and edit visitor.py, run pytest, and iteratively fix the AST parsing bugs.
